summary: MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) feature testing completed successfully. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified MOQ display, quantity selectors, and validation error toasts work correctly.

minor.issue: Legacy products created before MOQ feature don't have moq_value field in database. Frontend handles this by defaulting to 1.

backend_api_tests.test_01_create_fabric_with_decimal_moq: PASS - Created fabric with MOQ 2.5 yards
backend_api_tests.test_03_update_fabric_moq: PASS - Updated fabric MOQ to 3.5 yards
backend_api_tests.test_04_create_souvenir_with_integer_moq: PASS - Created souvenir with MOQ 20 pieces
backend_api_tests.test_06_update_souvenir_moq: PASS - Updated souvenir MOQ to 50 pieces
backend_api_tests.test_09_fabrics_api_returns_moq: PASS - API returns MOQ for new products
backend_api_tests.test_10_souvenirs_api_returns_moq: PASS - API returns MOQ for new products
backend_api_tests.test_11_fabric_order_with_valid_quantity: PASS - Order created with quantity >= MOQ
backend_api_tests.test_12_souvenir_order_with_valid_quanti: PASS - Order created with quantity >= MOQ

frontend_ui_tests.admin_products_page: PASS - MOQ field visible in Add/Edit forms
frontend_ui_tests.admin_fabrics_moq_label: PASS - Shows 'Minimum Order Quantity (Yards) *' with decimal helper text
frontend_ui_tests.admin_souvenirs_moq_label: PASS - Shows 'Minimum Order Quantity (Pieces) *' with whole number helper text
frontend_ui_tests.fabrics_page_moq_display: PASS - Shows 'Minimum Order: X Yards' for each product
frontend_ui_tests.souvenirs_page_moq_display: PASS - Shows 'Minimum Order: X Pieces' for each product
frontend_ui_tests.fabrics_quantity_selector: PASS - Input respects MOQ minimum with step 0.5
frontend_ui_tests.souvenirs_quantity_selector: PASS - Input respects MOQ minimum with step 1
frontend_ui_tests.fabrics_moq_validation: PASS - Error toast 'Minimum order for this fabric is 2.5 yards.' when qty < MOQ
frontend_ui_tests.fabrics_add_to_cart_success: PASS - Success toast 'Test Silk (2.5 yards) added to cart' when qty >= MOQ

critical_code_review_comments: Legacy products without moq_value field are handled gracefully by frontend (defaults to 1). Consider running a migration script to add moq_value=1 to existing products for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Test products with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up automatically. Test Silk fabric with MOQ 2.5 yards exists in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MOQ feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend stores moq_value (float for fabrics, int for souvenirs) and unit_type (yard/piece). Default MOQ is 1 if not set. Frontend displays MOQ on product pages and validates quantity before adding to cart. Admin can set MOQ when adding/editing products.

verified_features.admin_add_fabric_with_moq: Admin can add fabric with decimal MOQ (e.g., 2.5 yards)
verified_features.admin_add_souvenir_with_moq: Admin can add souvenir with integer MOQ (e.g., 20 pieces)
verified_features.admin_edit_product_moq: Admin can edit existing product MOQ
verified_features.fabrics_page_moq_display: Fabrics page shows 'Minimum Order: X Yards' for each product
verified_features.souvenirs_page_moq_display: Souvenirs page shows 'Minimum Order: X Pieces' for each product
verified_features.fabrics_quantity_selector: Fabrics page has quantity selector that respects MOQ minimum
verified_features.souvenirs_quantity_selector: Souvenirs page has quantity selector that respects MOQ minimum
verified_features.fabrics_moq_validation: Cannot add fabric to cart if quantity < MOQ (shows error toast)
verified_features.souvenirs_moq_validation: Cannot add souvenir to cart if quantity < MOQ (shows error toast)
verified_features.cart_quantity_controls: Cart quantity controls respect MOQ minimum
verified_features.checkout_validation: Checkout validation blocks orders below MOQ
